title: FreshArmor ! Hardcore mod
description: Angry mobs and new weapons. (Recommended using JEI)
body:
A mod with strange mobs (flying hungry zombie and more) and weapons (modern and magical). For get the modern weapons you need special villagers in structures (spawn only in plains).

### WARNING!
At start you have 4 hearts.

##  Items:

Creeper heart give you golden hearts and add 1 extra heart
![creeper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69acf3868c97af1e80e3b8a7f8a6824c8bcfb55d_0.webp)

Upd about:


Don't download on minecraft-club.ru and minemods.net it's not official 

Only download on modrinth.com or planetminecraft.com
